import { NavigateOptions } from './link.cjs'; import { RegisteredRouter } from './router.cjs'; export type UseNavigateResult<TDefaultFrom extends string> = <TRouter extends RegisteredRouter, TTo extends string | undefined, TFrom extends string = TDefaultFrom, TMaskFrom extends string = TFrom, TMaskTo extends string = ''>({ from, ...rest }: NavigateOptions<TRouter, TFrom, TTo, TMaskFrom, TMaskTo>) => Promise<void>;
